Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Continued To Apr-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jennifer Moss appearing for petitioner. Original 13101 declaration with death certificate presented. Two receipts are missing. Checks were issued on 2/13/06. Counsel sent in the orginal bank statment last week. It has not been filed yet. Matter is continued to 4/19. Counsel requests for payment of attorney's fees. Court is taking the matter under submissiion. No appearance is required on 4/19 if court issues an order before 4/19. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
